name: Roe's Ricotta Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 large Chocolate candy bar (Hershey's plain), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ricotta cheese, eggs, cinnamon, sugar, grated chocolate candy bar, cherries, and citron.
2. Pour the mixture into a pie dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
Mom used to make this at Easter and Christmas. It is very rich but so good. Cut the cherries into small pieces.
